name: property managers overseeing 5–10 properties tool
description: For property managers overseeing 5–10 properties, inefficient manual reporting causes late maintenance updates. We automate weekly maintenance checklist reporting instead of manual reporting via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient manual reporting of maintenance checklists

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient manual reporting of maintenance checklists
